name: example-webgl-holographic-foil
title: Holographic Foil

title_i18n.ja: ホログラフィック・フォイル

description: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: thin-film interference over a crushed-foil surface whose palette shifts with the viewing angle; move the cursor to tilt the film.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：褶皱箔片表面的薄膜干涉，调色随视角变化；移动光标倾斜箔片。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 自包含 WebGL2 主視覺：褶皺箔片表面的薄膜干涉，調色隨視角變化；移動游標傾斜箔片。
description_i18n.en: A self-contained WebGL2 hero: thin-film interference over a crushed-foil surface whose palette shifts with the viewing angle; move the cursor to tilt the film.

query.en: Build a self-contained WebGL2 hero of thin-film interference over a crushed foil, palette shifting with viewing angle, cursor-tilted.
query.zh-CN: 构建自包含 WebGL2 主视觉：褶皱箔片薄膜干涉，调色随视角变化，光标可倾斜。
